mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, s.student_no, s.name AS student_name, b.name AS building_name, d.room_number FROM bus_check_in c LEFT JOIN bus_student s ON s.id = c.student_id LEFT JOIN bus_dormitory d ON d.id = c.dormitory_id LEFT JOIN bus_building b ON b.id = d.building_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT c.*, s.student_no, s.name AS student_name, b.name AS building_name, d.room_number FROM bus_check_in c LEFT JOIN bus_student s ON s.id = c.student_id LEFT JOIN bus_dormitory d ON d.id = c.dormitory_id LEFT JOIN bus_building b ON b.id = d.building_id WHERE c.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 1
